title: Incorrect Trie Node Creation Due to Missing Child Node Deletion

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat:
The input consists of multiple strings where each string is followed by a query type (insert or search).
One blank line separates the strings from the query type.
The strings contain only lowercase English letters.
statement.outputFormat: For each query, print the result of the operation.
statement.notes: Trie node creation/deletion should be handled carefully to avoid any logical errors.

examples.input:
apple
banana
orange
insert
apple
search
canada

hints.text: Check the TrieNode class for any logical errors.

testCases.input:
apple
banana
canada
insert
apple
search
banana

apple
banana
canada
insert
canada
search
apple
